violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Milk wand cloth is replaced daily, or a few times per day. *Ensure cloth is replaced every 2 hours or less and/or when visibly soiled. -Cloth at prep counter between uses. *Should be stored in sanitizer between uses.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop laying with handle in ice.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Cream cheese and eggs were not dated for thaw date.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Using cloth as drain mat for 2nd ice scoop and stir spoon.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Ice bin lid foam is peeling/loose from edge.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
